name: ai-sdlc
description: A downloadable, multi-agent AI SDLC for any GitHub repo: PRD → aligned domain docs → vertical-slice issues → parallel subagents that each open a PR.

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: Autonomous, multi-agent AI SDLC. Composes the aihero.dev engineering skills (to-prd, to-issues, grill-with-docs, triage, tdd) and adds the orchestration/AFK layer: fan out one subagent per ready GitHub issue, each in its own git worktree, each opening a PR — plus a drain loop, a cron schedule, and quality-gate hooks.
